items: Building a Raft KV store in Go

entries.title: Refactoring portfolio data layer
entries.body: Moved all project data into a single projects.json + form-based admin editor. Now I can add a project in 90 seconds without touching JSX. Should have done this two months ago.

entries.title: Got Raft leader-election working
entries.body: Wrote it as a pure state machine with a fake clock — first time the test suite passed deterministically across 100 runs. Replication next.

entries.title: Onsite at a payments company
entries.body: First full-loop in three months. System design went well; behavioral I rambled on the 'tell me about a conflict' question. Practicing STAR format this week.

entries.title: DDIA chapter 5 — replication
entries.body: Single-leader vs. multi-leader vs. leaderless finally clicked. Helps that I was already mid-Raft when I read it.

entries.title: LATECHEF v1.2
entries.body: Added saved-recipes export to plaintext. Tiny feature; ten people emailed asking for it. Lesson: ship the small things.

entries.title: What I want from my first job
entries.body: Strong code review culture > fancy tech stack. Mentorship > prestige. Small team > big team if the small team ships. Trying to filter recruiter pings through these.
